user.title: NETGEAR Pro AV Switch
user.description: Add a NETGEAR Pro AV switch using the local AVUI REST API.

manual.title: Add NETGEAR Pro AV Switch
manual.description: Add one switch using the local AVUI REST API. Create a dedicated switch user in the NETGEAR web UI for Home Assistant; do not share the admin account with Engage or browser sessions.

subnet_scan.title: Scan for NETGEAR Pro AV Switches
subnet_scan.description: Scan a subnet for switches that respond to the local AVUI REST API. Create a dedicated switch user in the NETGEAR web UI for Home Assistant; do not share the admin account with Engage or browser sessions.

subnet_pick.title: Select NETGEAR Pro AV Switch
subnet_pick.description: Choose one of the switches found during the subnet scan.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered NETGEAR Pro AV Switch
discovery_confirm.description: Confirm the discovered switch and enter its AVUI credentials. Create a dedicated switch user in the NETGEAR web UI for Home Assistant; do not share the admin account with Engage or browser sessions.

init.title: NETGEAR Pro AV Switch options
init.description: Adjust connection, polling, and guarded control settings. Use a dedicated switch user for Home Assistant; sharing the admin account with Engage or browser sessions can interrupt switch API sessions.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the switch AVUI REST API.
error.invalid_subnet: Subnet must be a valid CIDR range.
error.invalid_vlan_list: VLAN IDs must be a comma-separated list of numbers from 1 to 4094.
error.no_switches_found: No NETGEAR Pro AV switches were found on that subnet.
error.subnet_too_large: Subnet scan is limited to 1024 addresses.

abort.already_in_progress: This switch is already being configured.
